---
title: "Week5_Practice"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Lists

```{r}
#| label: list
#| include: true
#| echo: true
#| message: false

#make a list
sale = list(id=2, quality="high",
            contents=c("apple", "cherry"), cost=c(4,5))
sale

#In terminal:

#To find 3rd item in the list: sale[[3]]
#To find 2nd item sold: sale$content[2] or sale[[3]][2]
#To add another element: sale$location = "farmers market"
#To remove an element: sale$location = NULL

```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
